cp_caplet_backend_kind_check.name: cp_caplet_backend_kind_check
cp_caplet_backend_kind_check.value: "cp_caplet_backend"."kind" IN ('mcp','openapi','googleDiscovery','graphql','http','cli','caplets') AND (("cp_caplet_backend"."kind" = 'caplets' AND "cp_caplet_backend"."child_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("cp_caplet_backend"."kind" <> 'caplets' AND "cp_caplet_backend"."child_id" IS NULL))

cp_caplet_catalog_icon_check.name: cp_caplet_catalog_icon_check
cp_caplet_catalog_icon_check.value: ("cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_type" IS NULL AND "cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_path" IS NULL AND "cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_url" IS NULL) OR ("cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_type" = 'local' AND "cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_path" IS NOT NULL AND "cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_url" IS NULL) OR ("cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_type" = 'external' AND "cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_path" IS NULL AND "cp_caplet_catalog"."icon_url" IS NOT NULL)

cp_caplet_declared_input_target_check.name: cp_caplet_declared_input_target_check
cp_caplet_declared_input_target_check.value: ("cp_caplet_declared_input"."reference_type" = 'local' AND "cp_caplet_declared_input"."path" IS NOT NULL AND "cp_caplet_declared_input"."url" IS NULL AND "cp_caplet_declared_input"."setup_name" IS NULL) OR ("cp_caplet_declared_input"."reference_type" = 'external' AND "cp_caplet_declared_input"."path" IS NULL AND "cp_caplet_declared_input"."url" IS NOT NULL AND "cp_caplet_declared_input"."setup_name" IS NULL) OR ("cp_caplet_declared_input"."reference_type" = 'unresolved-setup' AND "cp_caplet_declared_input"."path" IS NULL AND "cp_caplet_declared_input"."url" IS NULL AND "cp_caplet_declared_input"."setup_name" IS NOT NULL)

cp_caplet_reference_target_check.name: cp_caplet_reference_target_check
cp_caplet_reference_target_check.value: ("cp_caplet_reference"."reference_type" = 'local' AND "cp_caplet_reference"."path" IS NOT NULL AND "cp_caplet_reference"."url" IS NULL AND "cp_caplet_reference"."setup_name" IS NULL) OR ("cp_caplet_reference"."reference_type" = 'external' AND "cp_caplet_reference"."path" IS NULL AND "cp_caplet_reference"."url" IS NOT NULL AND "cp_caplet_reference"."setup_name" IS NULL) OR ("cp_caplet_reference"."reference_type" = 'unresolved-setup' AND "cp_caplet_reference"."path" IS NULL AND "cp_caplet_reference"."url" IS NULL AND "cp_caplet_reference"."setup_name" IS NOT NULL)

cp_host_setting_typed_value_check.name: cp_host_setting_typed_value_check
cp_host_setting_typed_value_check.value:
(
          (
            "cp_host_setting"."key" = 'native.daemon-url'
            AND json_type("cp_host_setting"."value", '$') = 'object'
            AND json_extract("cp_host_setting"."value", '$.source') = 'setup'
            AND json_type("cp_host_setting"."value", '$.url') = 'text'
            AND json_remove("cp_host_setting"."value", '$.source', '$.url') = '{}'
          )
          OR ("cp_host_setting"."key" = 'telemetry' AND json_type("cp_host_setting"."value", '$') IN ('true', 'false'))
          OR (
            "cp_host_setting"."key" IN (
              'options.defaultSearchLimit',
              'options.exposureDiscoveryTimeoutMs',
              'options.completion.discoveryTimeoutMs',
              'options.completion.overallTimeoutMs'
            )
            AND json_type("cp_host_setting"."value", '$') = 'integer'
            AND json_extract("cp_host_setting"."value", '$') > 0
          )
          OR (
            "cp_host_setting"."key" = 'options.maxSearchLimit'
            AND json_type("cp_host_setting"."value", '$') = 'integer'
            AND json_extract("cp_host_setting"."value", '$') BETWEEN 1 AND 50
          )
          OR (
            "cp_host_setting"."key" = 'options.exposureDiscoveryConcurrency'
            AND json_type("cp_host_setting"."value", '$') = 'integer'
            AND json_extract("cp_host_setting"."value", '$') BETWEEN 1 AND 32
          )
          OR (
            "cp_host_setting"."key" IN (
              'options.completion.cacheTtlMs',
              'options.completion.negativeCacheTtlMs'
            )
            AND json_type("cp_host_setting"."value", '$') = 'integer'
            AND json_extract("cp_host_setting"."value", '$') >= 0
          )
          OR (
            "cp_host_setting"."key" = 'options.exposure'
            AND json_type("cp_host_setting"."value", '$') = 'text'
            AND json_extract("cp_host_setting"."value", '$') IN (
              'direct',
              'progressive',
              'code_mode',
              'direct_and_code_mode',
              'progressive_and_code_mode'
            )
          )
          OR (
            "cp_host_setting"."key" = 'namespaceAliases'
            AND json_type("cp_host_setting"."value", '$') = 'object'
            AND json_type("cp_host_setting"."value", '$.upstreams') = 'object'
            AND json_remove("cp_host_setting"."value", '$.local', '$.upstreams') = '{}'
            AND (
              json_type("cp_host_setting"."value", '$.local') IS NULL
              OR (
                json_type("cp_host_setting"."value", '$.local') = 'text'
                AND length(json_extract("cp_host_setting"."value", '$.local')) BETWEEN 1 AND 32
                AND substr(json_extract("cp_host_setting"."value", '$.local'), 1, 1) GLOB '[a-z]'
                AND NOT json_extract("cp_host_setting"."value", '$.local') GLOB '*[^a-z0-9-]*'
                AND (
                  length(json_extract("cp_host_setting"."value", '$.local')) = 1
                  OR substr(json_extract("cp_host_setting"."value", '$.local'), -1, 1) GLOB '[a-z0-9]'
                )
              )
            )
            AND json_extract("cp_host_setting"."value", '$.upstreams') NOT GLOB '*:[^"]*'
            AND json_extract("cp_host_setting"."value", '$.upstreams') NOT GLOB '*:""*[},]'
            AND json_extract("cp_host_setting"."value", '$.upstreams') NOT GLOB '*:"[^a-z]*'
            AND json_extract("cp_host_setting"."value", '$.upstreams') NOT GLOB '*-"[},]*'
          )
        )

cp_key_canary_protection_check.name: cp_key_canary_protection_check
cp_key_canary_protection_check.value: ("cp_key_canary"."protection" = 'aead' AND "cp_key_canary"."nonce" IS NOT NULL AND "cp_key_canary"."ciphertext" IS NOT NULL AND "cp_key_canary"."auth_tag" IS NOT NULL AND "cp_key_canary"."verifier" IS NULL) OR ("cp_key_canary"."protection" = 'hmac' AND "cp_key_canary"."nonce" IS NULL AND "cp_key_canary"."ciphertext" IS NULL AND "cp_key_canary"."auth_tag" IS NULL AND "cp_key_canary"."verifier" IS NOT NULL)
